notes: Actionable: yes, but in a 1:1 / coaching context rather than a roadmap-decision context — which is appropriate for this specific verse. The implication asks the engineer to 'name what attachment is currently consuming your attention budget' when focus is failing on a substrate-level problem. That is a reproducible self-audit a senior IC or staff+ can run. Testable predicate (3.11): the diagnostic is whether attention is fully present at the substrate, checkable against the engineer's own debugger session and PR description quality. The verse does not ask for promotion-renunciation; it asks for attention-release. PASS for both 7.3 and 3.11.
